para_trans: Regarding partial changes in the agenda of the Aastha-07 and Aastha-90 assignments in the Revenue and Forest Department.
Government Corrigendum No: - OFM-2024 / Q. No.96 / E,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Read: - 1) Revenue and Revenue Department, Government Circular No: - OFM-2024 / P.No.96 / E, D. 10/07/2025.
2) Revenue & Forest Department, Office Order No: - OFM-2024 / Q. No.96 / E,
3) Revenue & Forest Department, Office Order No: - OFM-2024 / Q. No.96 / E,
4) Revenue & Forest Department, Office Order No: - OFM-2024 / Q. No.96 / E,

The Table of Contents of Office in the Revenue and Forest Departments Reference No. 1 has been published by the Government Circular No. In this table of contents, Reference No. It has been amended under sections 02, 03 and 04. The topic "Establishment of Board Officers and Related Matters" from the Task Force "Aastha-07" in the Sub-Division of Revenue Sub-Division in Annexure A to this Schedule is being included in the Task Force "Aastha-10" for administrative reasons. Accordingly, the revised agenda of the two offices is as per the accompanying Annexure. (Annexure) 02. This Government Circular was made available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
